name: Cajun Lentil Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a 3-quart saucepan over medium-high heat.
2. Add the onion and garlic; cook, stirring until softened.
3. Add the water and bay leaf; bring to a boil.
4. Stir in the lentils; return to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat; simmer for 30 minutes.
6. Stir in the tomatoes with their liquid; break up the tomatoes with the back of a spoon.
7. Add the wine, tomato paste, sugar, basil, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
8. Reduce the heat; simmer for 10 more minutes.
9. Add the zucchini; simmer for another 15 minutes.
10. Discard the bay leaf before serving. This stew is a Louisiana-style chili. It can also be served as a sauce over polenta or brown rice.
